tagline: Check in before you book in.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Personalise your stay experience across light and dark modes.
settings.appearance_subtitle: Choose how the app adapts to your environment.
settings.quick_subtitle: Toggle the theme without leaving any page.

theme.system_desc: Match the look and feel of your device settings.
theme.light_desc: Bright surfaces with high contrast for daytime use.
theme.dark_desc: Reduce eye strain with deeper hues and soft contrast.

feedback.report_bug_subtitle: Found something broken? Let us know
feedback.prompt: What would you like to share?
feedback.title_hint: Give it a short, descriptive title
feedback.description_hint: Tell us what happened or what you would like to see
feedback.missing_details_message: Please add a title and a description before submitting.
feedback.bug_success_message: Thanks for the report. Our team will look into it shortly.
feedback.feature_success_message: Thanks for the suggestion. Our team will review it shortly.
feedback.error_message: We could not send your feedback. Please try again.

enquiries.title: Inquiries
enquiries.empty_body:
When you send an inquiry through our app,
your requests will appear here.
enquiries.no_match_body: Try adjusting your filter options or clear them to revisit all your inquiries.

update.title: Update Available
update.required_message: A critical update is required to continue using this app. Please update to the latest version.
update.store_unavailable: Unable to open the app store. Please update manually.
